description: A designed graphic with a red 'WANTED' banner across the top over a booking-style portrait of a young man with short dark hair. A red footer reads 'ANONYMOUS TIP LINE 866-DHS-2-ICE' alongside a U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement wordmark and Homeland Security seal.
notable_text: WANTED; ANONYMOUS TIP LINE 866-DHS-2-ICE; U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement
